channel.title: Multipages on Camille's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Multipages on Camille's Blog

item.title: Document Understanding Models handling Multipages Documents
item.description: Most current document processing models often struggle with maintaining context and coherence across multiple pages, leading to fragmented and inaccurate outputs. Some recent models have developed techniques to handle a document as a whole, and not page by page .colored { background-color: rgba(255, 235, 59, 0.6); padding: 0 1px; font-weight: bold; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(255, 235, 59, 0.6); display: inline; line-height: 1.5; } . However, these advancements are still in their early stages and face several challenges.
